race.comment: GRAND VOILE (5) has returned in good order this preparation. Won her maiden first-up over 1208m at Port Macquarie then finished second over 1305m at this track last time. Should be poised just off the lead. Sure to be in the finish. DANCINGONTHEROSSO (3) launched her career with a win two runs ago. Not as effective last time out when seventh over 1262m at Taree, beaten 4 lengths. Finds a suitable race and can return to form. HEADSTREAM (6) missed the placings two runs back then didn't feature last start when seventh over 1600m at Coffs Harbour after being in the firing line on the turn. Finds the right race this time and can find winning form. THE MYSTERY GUY (7) is experiencing a long win drought, extended last start when fourth over 1200m at Quirindi. Good enough on his day and can fill a top-three spot.
